# DAVID

**Galaxy Tool ID**: `hgv_david`
**Version**: 1.0.1
**Category**: Phenotype Association

> functional annotation for a list of genes

## Example Query

> "Run DAVID on my data"

## Run via Galaxy Bridge

```bash
python galaxy_bridge.py --tool-details hgv_david
python galaxy_bridge.py --run hgv_david --input <file> --output <dir>
```
